description: KIRITHRA draws you into a rich, sweet olfactory experience that drifts from blossoming petals to the warmth of ambered woods. Introduced with the lush sweetness of Sidr Honey, it seamlessly blends with the bright, fresh zest of Clementine, deepened by the smoky undertone of Birch Tar. A captivating, radiant opening that entices the senses. As it lingers, the historic rose note of Roseraie de l'Hay unfolds in harmony with the delicately creamy Sampaguita, infusing a softer, more floral touch into the scent. The woody and peppery profile of Akigalawood then lends a grounding contrast that enhances the heart. In its final embrace, the base settles into a comforting caress of ambery Georgywood, musky Cashmeran, and sweet-earthy Sulawesi Patchouli, transforming the journey of sweetness and florals into a refined and warmly enveloping trail Ambery Bergamot Earthy Fresh Musky Spicy Warm

description: Alcohol-Free Fragrance Stick - Intense Floral, Fruity and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Miss Dior Parfum is reinvented in an alcohol-free solid perfume with a sheer finish, to apply the intense floral, fruity and woody notes of the fragrance directly to the skin. A mini-object with maxi-effects, Miss Dior Parfum solid perfume is highly concentrated to prolong the scent of Miss Dior Parfum. Infused with rose wax, the stick melts comfortably onto the skin, without any sticky residue, leaving it fragrant and hydrated. The solid perfume is applied on pulse points (neck, d�collet�, wrists) on its own or as complementary touch-ups to the spray. Miss Dior Parfum Mini Miss is housed in a jacquard case woven with the houndstooth pattern, a signature of the Dior wardrobe style. A forest floor carpeted with moss seems to envelop the composition. Heart Notes STAR JASMINE Floral accords dominated by the intensity of a jasmine note, tailor-made for Dior. description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is intriguingly powerful and appealingly fresh. Dior Homme redefines a new, masculine sensuality in a polyphony of smooth and raw wood. A heart of tender wood, in which the virility of Atlas Cedar embraces the enveloping warmth of Haitian Vetiver tinged with spice. Wood hand-chiseled by Dior. Dior Homme conveys all the facets of modern masculinity. A man, yes, but a man of many nuances: confident in both his strength and his tenderness. Dior Homme Eau de Toilette is a fragrance with a bold trail that leaves a sensual imprint. ingredients #13837/A ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � ETHYLHEXYL METHOXYCINNAMATE � HYDROXYCITRONELLAL � LINALOOL � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRONELLOL � DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE � BHT � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE � COUMARIN � CITRAL � GERANIOL � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � TOCOPHEROL � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) � CI 19140 (YELLOW 5) � application tips Prolong the trail of Dior Homme Eau de Toilette with the Dior Homme ritual: 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of the Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with the Dior Homme aftershave balm. 3. Freshen up with the Dior Homme spray deodorant. olfactory notes Base Notes Vetiver The molecule Iso E gradually settles into the composition, endlessly lingering and drawing out the sensuality of the scent of light wood. The only compound of its kind, it gives Dior Homme that inexplicable "deliciously clean" and fresh sensation. A persistent impression of washed wood, wholly contained in a single, rather magical, note. Heart Notes PATCHOULI HEART Like a friend who ties it all together, the Patchouli Heart is full and enveloping. It mingles with the virile woods to convey a caressing sensuality. Top Notes ATLAS CEDAR Atlas Cedar blows its dry and subtly leathery warmth through the trail of Dior Homme. Combined with Vetiver, it leads a polyphony of woods filled with tension and dialogue. nama_parfum: Mykonos - Hawaiian Crush Extrait de Parfum 50ml
description: Mykonos - Hawaiian Crush Extrait de Parfum 50ml An artful explosion of the senses that transports you to the enchanting landscapes of Hawaii. Embrace the beauty of contrast where the first whiff bursts with vibrancy and the last sniff unravels a depth of mystery. Envision yourself in a sun-drenched orchard in the first whiff, where the sweetness of ripe, juicy lychee meets enticing black tea. At the heart, the fragrance unfolds delicate whispers of rose and lily of the valley setting the image of a lush Hawaiian garden, where soft petals shimmer in the setting sun. At its dry down, Hawaiian Crush reveals its magic on Hawaii's shores, where crimson and gold ignite the sky. Amidst the breeze, the scent transforms into a sensuous blend of velvety musk and intoxicating incense, evoking the romance, passion, and mystique of a Hawaiian sunset. A scent that truly feels like an abstract painting in a bottle. description: Mykonos - Musk Aura Extrait de Parfum 100ml An ode to the beauty and sensuality of �Musks�. Musk Aura is an enchanting fragrance that combines the allure of delicate rose and jasmine with the irresistible sensuality of musk. Specially crafted to capture the essence of island evenings, where the warm tropical breeze carries the intoxicating aroma of blooming flowers, setting the stage for intimate encounters and unforgettable moments of romance and seduction. Heady notes of florals intertwine with the fresh and lively essence of sweet apples, creating an aura of femininity and grace. The base notes anchor the fragrance with the allure of musk. A blend of velvety white musk and subtle hints of amber and nectarine create a seductive foundation that wraps you in a warm and intimate embrace. Musk Aura is the embodiment of seduction and passion under the stars. It's the perfect companion for evenings spent on a secluded beach or dancing under the moonlight. nama_parfum: Mykonos - California Club Extrait de Parfum 50ml
description: California Club Extrait de Parfum 50ml The Sophisticated Night by The Sea As the sun dips below the horizon and the ocean glows under moonlight, California Club emerges. A fragrance inspired by the intoxicating allure of a seaside nightclub. The metallic tinge of the ocean breeze mixes with a refined blend of marine notes, giving an edge of mystery and sophistication. At the heart of California Club that truly defines its nighttime elegance. The deep floral richness of rose, iris, and violet brings an unexpected depth, adding an intoxicating, almost velvety allure. These middle notes weave together, creating a fragrance that is both bold and refined, a scent that unfolds as the night progresses. California Club is for the modern sophisticate who enjoys the finer things in life. A scent that is more formal, collected, and effortlessly cool, it's made for nights of confidence, conversation, and oceanfront glamour. nama_parfum: Cloud Mist Travel Size AM KAMIN
description: Am Kamin invites you to immerse in the euphonious sonata of acceptance- a genuine consolation from acknowledging the present time, found among the closest souls whose warmth enfolds and inspires. nama_parfum: HMNS Philea Eau De Parfum 100 ml
description: HMNS Perfume - Philea 100ml Elea adalah seorang teman yang selalu ada untukmu. Tapi dunia berputar dan kamu menghadapi dewasa. Kita butuh teman lain yang menemanimu bertumbuh. Bersama Tsana, kita menemukan bunga Mimosa. Ia menjelma menjadi sosok peri yang merayakanmu bersemi dengan bungamu sendiri. Dengan wangi Magnolia, Mimosa dan Cashmeran yang kuat tapi lembut. Perkenalkan, ini Elea EDP, atau bisa kamu panggil� Philea. Ketahanan: 6�8 jam. Jejak Aroma: Meninggalkan aroma yang cukup kuat saat kamu lewat. Jangkauan: Tercium hingga 1,5�2 meter. Pengiriman Pengiriman setiap hari Senin sampai Jumat, dan batas pemesanan agar dikirim dihari yang sama jam 12 siang. Lebih dari jam 12 siang masuk pengiriman besok harinya. Tidak ada pengiriman di tanggal merah dan Weekend. Pemesanan hari Jumat akan di kirim di hari Senin sore. Untuk pengiriman via kurir instan untuk launching pertama kali belum disediakan. Pengiriman dilakukan dari Jakarta, dan durasi pengiriman disesuaikan dengan kebijakan jarak dan ketepatan waktu masing-masing jasa antar. Apabila ada kendala silahkan langsung menghubungi CS HMNS, dan kami akan langsung membantu. Love, HMNS.

Eau de Toilette - Fresh, Woody and Spicy Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Energetic and elegant, the new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette combines fresh vivacity and charm tinted with sensuality for a duo that strikes like a boxer's uppercut. Vibrant, explosive, the opening signature of Dior Homme Sport is marked by citrus and the open air, freshness and movement. For this new Dior Homme Sport, the Dior Perfumer-Creator chose to tinge the composition with warm and amber notes, wrap it in spices and round it out with woody notes. The confident trail of Dior Homme Sport incarnates a masculinity entwined with smooth, noble qualtiy. The new Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette plays freshness and sensuality. It's a luminous scent enriched with a new, lasting impression that takes hold and lingers like a caress. ingredients #16128 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LIMONENE � LINALOOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � HEXYL CINNAMAL � CITRAL � CITRONELLOL � TRIETHYL CITRATE � EUGENOL � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � CINNAMAL � GERANIOL � TRIS(TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � CI 14700 (RED 4) � CI 47005 (YELLOW 10) � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) application tips Prolong the trail of Dior Homme Sport eau de toilette with the Dior Homme ritual: 1. Awaken the senses with the invigorating notes of Dior Homme shower gel. 2. Soften your skin with Dior Homme after-shave balm. 3. Get that fresh feeling with Dior Homme spray deodorant. olfactory notes Base Notes Frankincense and Woody Notes Frankincense appears for the first time at the heart of Dior Homme Sport, heightened and generous. It inspires a heavenly intensity that melds with the woods and amber, emblematic signatures of Dior Homme. Heart Notes Elemi and Pink Pepper This thunderous departure is enriched with intense fresh notes, like the ultra-powerful, resinous and lemony Elemi that enters into dialogue with the juicy citrus and further heightens its expressiveness. Explosive, the peppery spice of Pink Pepper joins in the dance of the new fragrance's composition. Top Notes Reggio di Calabria Bergamot An absolute signature of vibrant top notes, Reggio di Calabria Bergamot is a juicy, zesty and distinguished gust of wind, upheld by an Italian Lemon note. It's a knock to the senses, an appeal to an irresistible freshness now propelled by a vibrant aldehyde note. Sauvage Eau de Parfum is thus the olfactory interpretation of a moment tinted with a thick blue that unleashes the wildest instincts. In the hour when the wolves come out and the sky is set ablaze, a new magic unfolds. Sauvage Eau de Parfum teams the freshness of a juicy, spicy Calabrian bergamot note with the sensuality of a mysterious and enveloping Papua New Guinean vanilla extract accord to unfurl a powerful and noble trail. The 100 ml bottle of Sauvage Eau de Parfum is now refillable with the Sauvage Eau de Parfum refill. It can also be refilled at the Sauvage Refill Station, available at selected sales locations. description: Elixir - Spicy, Fresh and Woody Notes description ingredients application tips olfactory notes description Sauvage Elixir is an extraordinarily* concentrated fragrance steeped in the emblematic freshness of Sauvage with an intoxicating heart of spices, a "tailor-made" lavender essence and a blend of rich woods forming the signature of its powerful, lavish and captivating trail. The Sauvage Elixir fragrance was created like a fine liqueur made of exceptional ingredients. This concentration was made possible by the exceptional quality of the raw materials: Sauvage Elixir is a fragrance as unique and rare as a red moon in the night sky. Sauvage Elixir concentrates all of its power in a midnight blue lacquered glass bottle in a unique* 60 ml size. This precious bottle, shaped like a vial, features multiple sophisticated designs: the magical name of the fragrance is inscribed in shiny silver on a label engraved right into the glass. The dome-shaped bottom engraved with the CD logo marks its silhouette. * At Dior.1 ingredients #15755 ALCOHOL � PARFUM (FRAGRANCE) � AQUA (WATER) � LINALOOL � LIMONENE � COUMARIN � CITRONELLOL � EUGENOL � BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE � TRIETHYL CITRATE � PENTAERYTHRITYL TETRA-DI-T-BUTYL HYDROXYHYDROCINNAMATE � GERANIOL � CINNAMAL � CITRAL � EVERNIA FURFURACEA (TREEMOSS) EXTRACT � FARNESOL � ISOEUGENOL � CI 60730 (EXT. VIOLET 2) � CI 19140 (YELLOW 5) � CI 42090 (BLUE 1) application tips 1. Cleanse your skin with Sauvage Shower Gel. 2. Soothe razor burn with Sauvage After-shave Lotion. >3. Apply Sauvage Elixir on pulse points. olfactory notes Base Notes Rich woods An ambery accord, the powerful Sauvage signature, reveals its full range of velvety and sensual nuances. Enveloping, it blankets the base heightened with a sweet, smooth licorice note. Haitian vetiver and a patchouli heart form the link between these rich woods. Heart Notes Essence of AOP lavender from Nyons A blend of several carefully selected harvests, this AOP essence from Nyons reveals unique* facets and releases notes that are as close as possible to the wild flower. Fresh but not camphorous, graced with a vanilla-tinged coumarin note, it is rich, fine and floral. Top Notes Grapefruit note and heart of spices Top notes burst with a lively, persistent grapefruit note and heady spices. Some, like the essences of cinnamon and nutmeg, play with heat and sensuality, while others are more refreshing, like the zesty and aromatic cardamom.
